name: flow-nondeterminism-warn
description: Tier 2: with on_nondeterminism=warn, a step recorded under one key crashes; on resume a differently-keyed step at the same seq diverges. Warn journals a flow:branch:warn marker IN PLACE (at the divergent seq itself, not a high seq lane) and continues live from the next seq — the divergent effect DOES run. Stubs skip tier-2 scenarios; the real core runs this in crates/keel-core/tests/flows_conformance.rs.
